ccel.title: NPNF-212. Leo the Great, Gregory the Great

title: To the people of Ravenna.

source.title: NPNF-212. Leo the Great, Gregory the Great

verses.book: Register of the Epistles of St. Gregory the Great.
verses.text: Gregory to the clergy, gentry, and common people of Ravenna.

verses.book: Register of the Epistles of St. Gregory the Great.
verses.text: Having been informed of the death of your bishop, we have taken care to delegate to our brother and fellow-bishop Severus of Ficulum the visitation of the bereaved Church, to whom we have given in charge to allow nothing with respect to the promotions of the clergy, the revenues, ornaments, and ministrations, to be usurped by any one.

verses.book: Register of the Epistles of St. Gregory the Great.
verses.text: It is for you to render obedience to his assiduous exhortations.

verses.book: Register of the Epistles of St. Gregory the Great.
